attribution.text: EOC Base Map Service from DLR

meta.description: Monthly maps of NOx shipping emissions across European waters at 0.5° spatial resolution, derived from regional atmospheric inversions. These posterior estimates assimilate TROPOMI NO₂ observations to refine the CAMS-REG-v8/STEAM shipping inventory, capturing monthly variations in maritime emission patterns.

Monthly maps of CH₄ shipping emissions across European waters at 0.5° spatial resolution, derived from regional atmospheric inversions. These posterior estimates assimilate TROPOMI-SRON CH₄ observations to refine the CAMS-REG-v8/STEAM shipping inventory, capturing monthly variations in maritime emission patterns

Monthly maps of fossil fuel CO₂ shipping emissions across European waters at 0.5° spatial resolution, derived from the NOx regional inversion results. These estimates translate the optimised NOx shipping emissions into corresponding CO₂ estimates, capturing monthly variations in maritime emission patterns

This dataset provides gridded binary data at an hourly temporal resolution and at a finer spatial resolution of 0.05° × 0.1° from 2019 to 2023, covering the European maritime domain (15.25°W to 40°E; 25°N to 74.25°N).    In principle, STEAM produces detailed ship emission estimates by integrating vessel activity data from the Orbcomm Ltd AIS archive with technical specifications from the S&P Global databases. It models ship fuel consumption and emissions by incorporating its internal database of ship-specific parameters, such as engine load and abatement technologies, and environmental influences, including wind, sea ice, and ocean currents from the Copernicus Climate Data Store (CDS) and Copernicus Marine Environmental Monitoring Service (CMEMS). Recent refinements of STEAM include updated emission factors for NOx, CO2, SOx, PM2.5, and alternative fuels like methanol and ammonia, ensuring alignment with evolving maritime regulations and technologies.

sources.name: Shipping Lanes Emissions based on maritime traffic patterns

charts.title: CSV data from file refernced in statistics-url field

meta.description: Maritime shipping lanes are defined based on maritime traffic patterns from the STEAM 2023 dataset.
